name: Sublime Security
description: Sublime Security — Open-source email security platform with MQL-based detection rules for BEC, phishing, and malware analysis.

seo.title: Sublime Security — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Sublime Security: Sublime Security — Open-source email security platform with MQL-based detection rules for BEC, phishing, and malware analysis.

when_to_use: MQL-based phishing detection rules for custom email threats
BEC and spear-phishing detection with open-source rules
Email malware analysis via attachment sandboxing
Community rule sharing for emerging email threat detection
Self-hosted email security for privacy-sensitive organizations

pros: Open source core lets teams audit detection logic
MQL rule language is expressive and readable
Active rule-sharing community ships detections fast
cons: Self-hosting still requires ops effort to run well
Smaller brand footprint versus Abnormal or Proofpoint
Cloud version pricing not always public
review.verdict: A refreshingly transparent email security platform for teams that want to own their detection logic.
review.best_for: Security engineers who want to read, write, and own their email detection rules.
review.not_for: Teams wanting fully black-box AI-driven email protection with zero tuning responsibility.
